_comment: Previous-nights gallery. Drop web-sized photos in assets/img/sunset/ and add an entry here (newest first — entries with a date sort by date, undated keep their position). Community submissions arrive via the moderation queue on sunset.html and get added here by hand after review.

photos.caption: Violet and ember over a glass-calm lake, the Adirondacks just a shadow.
The whole sky catches fire, right down to the waves at your feet.
Blue hour over the moorings, one last band of gold on the horizon.
Low water turns the beach into a mirror for a mottled pink sky.
A kinetic sculpture turns against the coral at the water's edge.
